title: Amtech N2410 Gauntlet Gloves XL (Size 10) Heavy Duty, Suitable for the dirtier cleaning and maintenance tasks, Red
features: The Amtech heavy duty PVC gauntlet gloves are durable and ideal for dirtier cleaning, maintenance task around the home, garage and garden
These extra large size work gloves have a high abrasion and tear resistance feature, making them more dependable.
The Amtech N2410 safety gloves are officially size 10, and benefit from a polyester lining lining and longer sleeves for additional protection.
Please note that these heavy duty PVC gloves are CE compliant. These gloves comply with the general requirements of the PPE Regulation EU 2016/425 as a Category II product
description: Product Description The Amtech heavy duty PVC gloves are of a certified quality, meaning that they meet EU standards for health, safety, and environmental protection. These PVC work gloves are Ideal for drain and gutter clearance and feature tear and high abrasion resistance. Benefits from interlocked cotton lining and longer sleeves for protection. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your safety & workwear requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
